text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right, it looks like you're actually<n>serious about this. Let's forget the<n>routine for now and review the basic<n>steps.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There! Hehe... ♪ Good! Now we're<n>really in step!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Huh... Never seen this side of her...)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You're good at this! Could it<n>be? I think you might be enjoying it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd say it's 'cause you've been<n>in a groove the last few times.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm just glad knowing how much<n>your friends are going to like it.<n>Anyone who's debuted gets terribly<n>busy this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep, all those big races right around<n>the corner... And some are heading<n>into the season you only get one shot<n>at.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's inevitable that the main stars of<n>the Droit end up being the ones<n>who've accomplished everything<n>they set out to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Until now, the Droit has been more<n>about making memories. That's<n>important in order to move on to the<n>next step of our lives.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's why I think... the Droit should<n>be like a ceremony where everyone<n>can renew their motivation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Both those who've debuted and<n>those who haven't yet... They're all<n>putting their hearts into their dreams<n>and goals every single day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But no one, not even the best of us,<n>can keep running without ever<n>resting. We need time to catch our<n>breath, to leave today behind and<n>embrace tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's why I want as many peopleas possible to come. Especially theones who can keep running until theyachieve their goals.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Everyone should start the year<n>having fun... And I'll do everything I<n>can to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (So that's it. I finally get what she's<n>after.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (She really does simply want to make<n>the Droit as great as she can. Okay...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Look, I'm not the most suitable<n>partner for you. Not 'cause I don't<n>want to. We're just completely<n>different people.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're mistaken about me.<n>I only do things for myself. Making<n>people smile ☆ never fits into my<n>game plan.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm not mistaken at all. There's a<n>good reason I chose you...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But never mind. I knew that together,<n>you and I would be able to bring the<n>biggest smiles to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The vibe's on point for a party, but<n>overall it's just noise. I knew I'd<n>hate trying to make people dance...<n>Also...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (What am I doing making all these<n>damn playlists? It's all 'cause the<n>prez started with this nonsense.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Asking !monad to be the DJ! How'd<n>she even find my account?!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (I never told anyone. I was just<n>playing around to de-stress after<n>doing analysis work—totally amateur<n>stuff.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Well, I did sell a couple things that<n>ended up being good enough. But<n>nothing I posted ever went viral, so<n>how?)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (How the hell did she find me? If she<n>knows and is trying to drag me out<n>into the open, that's plain evil... Or<n>maybe it's even worse if it's all a<n>coincidence.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (What the hell is she thinking? She<n>just thought of "DJ time" out of<n>nowhere? Not to mention, I've never<n>DJ'd for an audience in my life.<n>Although...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Crap!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: A "prosperous future"? "Climb togreater heights"? You just want to bethe one who bestows those thingsto us... If that's not ego, I don't knowwhat is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (I took an arrogant stance despite<n>myself. Sirius isn't to blame. This time<n>of the year... makes me weak.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Students finish their lives at school<n>and move on, their smiles marred by<n>tears—no, it is I who mars them.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: (Could it really all just be my ego?<n>Are my reasons for celebrating others<n>driven by my selfish indulgence? )

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What has you looking so somber,<n>President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki? How rare to see you<n>here. But never mind that. You look<n>stunning. "A rose among thorns"<n>perfectly suits you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, stop exaggerating. I find myself<n>more captivated by your pensive<n>expression. If I'm worthy enough,<n>might I give my assistance?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, you'll be leading the students in<n>the exhibition dance... That's already<n>more than enough help for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes, the Droit. I have a feeling the<n>participation rate you've been<n>concerned about is going to be more<n>than in previous years, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Have there perhaps been issues<n>setting up the new DJ time? I heard<n>about the idea, that it was sent<n>through the suggestion app.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What was it... "Dresses and dancing<n>aren't really my thing. I just want to<n>make memories with the people most<n>important to me..." Was that it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm sure others feel the same<n>way. I approved the idea because I<n>thought it'd be an opportunity for the<n>students to move forward.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Only... I still haven't gotten a reply<n>from the music artist mentioned in the<n>suggestion. I'm also in the process of<n>recruiting more students to DJ.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I see. However, aren't things<n>progressing well enough? Meaning...<n>what's really bothering you...<n>concerns yourself?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It wouldn't be like you to pry any<n>further. Though, the fact that you're<n>pushing this far might suggest<n>otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh dear... But I think I can tell when<n>it's the right time to dig just a little<n>more... What do you say?
